text.title: Active Listening Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: scoping a slow-deployment stakeholder session and generating the matching RASA script.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Session goal: understand why deployment takes 4 hours from a DevOps lead who is skeptical of new tooling. Channel: live-video. Stakes: medium.

section.title: Step 1 — scope record
Step 2 — generated RASA script
section.code: { "goal": "Understand why deployment process takes 4 hours.", "interviewee_profile": "DevOps lead, 5 years on the team, skeptical of new tooling.", "receive_opener": "I'll close the laptop for the next 30 minutes. Take whatever space you need.", "appreciate_phrases": ["I see.", "Go on.", "That makes sense."], "summarize_starters": [ "So if I understand you, the bottleneck is...", "What I'm hearing is that the manual step...", "Let me play that back: the data export..." ], "ask_questions": [ "Walk me through what happens after the export.", "How does the current process affect your team's morning?", "What does a good day with this process look like?", "Tell me about the last time it broke.", "In what way would you change it if you had a free week?" ], "reflective_prompts": ["It sounds like you're [FEELING] because [CONTENT] — fill live."], "silence_cue": "Pause 3-5 seconds after each answer before asking the next question.", "channel": "live-video" }

section.title: Step 4 — post-pass transcript flag
section.p: Annotator finds 2 windows where interviewer word-share > 20% (around mins 7 and 14) and notes that Summarize was applied only once (after a 6-question Ask stretch). Coaching note: insert one Summarize between every 3 Asks.
